recap: Rewrote git-file-revert with three-way dispatch: HEAD checkout, git rm for staged-new, rm for untracked; added bats tests covering all four dirty states plus multi-file.
Created complete-git-files-dirty autoload function, _git-files-dirty compdef, and registered git-file-revert in compdef.zsh; 6 bats tests covering all dirty states including staged-new.
Created fzf-git-files-dirty picker using git-file-list-dirty-raw with D/M/A color dispatch; wired vfrevert into ctrl-p.zsh specialPickers; 5 bats --source tests covering all dirty states.
